catalysts_general: Baltic Tanker Index volatile; Red Sea rerouting adds ton-miles; newbuild orderbook growing suggesting rate cycle peak (Tier 4: Reuters shipping; Tier 5: Baltic Exchange data)

Discovery: The 2026 Hormuz crisis pushed VLCC day rates to an unprecedented $423K/day on the Middle East-China route; International Seaways reported fleetwide blended spot rates above $100K/day in Q1 2026 and gained 11% since the crisis began (vs. peers down 11%) — structurally longer rerouting around the Strait sustains elevated rates even after a truce.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Tanker cycle showing signs of peaking; newbuild orderbook growing; Red Sea rerouting ton-miles partially offset; wait for rate recovery confirmation
